purpose: A data transformer module that accepts JSON payloads and applies a configurable transformation pipeline (filter, map, reshape) declaratively specified in the request. Enables agents to restructure data without writing imperative code.

endpoints.description: Apply transformation pipeline to input JSON

agent_usage.when_to_use: When you need to reshape, filter, or derive fields from JSON data without custom code
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: When complex business logic or database joins are required

failure_modes.recovery: Use default values or validate input before transform
Fix pipeline definition to avoid cycles

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not execute arbitrary code from pipeline

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Support operations: pick, omit, rename, flatten, mapValues (basic arithmetic), filter. Use pure functions only. Return a NEW object — never mutate input.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Nested field paths like 'user.address.city' require safe traversal. Handle null/undefined intermediate nodes gracefully.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Create a PipelineRunner class that takes an array of operation objects and applies them sequentially. Each op returns a transformed copy.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do NOT use JSON.parse with reviver for arbitrary code execution. Do NOT mutate input data in place.

test_cases.name: preserve original
test_cases.notes: string expressions rejected — must not eval
